title: Triple-Layer Nightmare
description:
This challenge uses multiple layers of encoding.

Your task: Decode the following string:

Njg2Zjc3NWY2OTczNWY2ODYxNzI2NA==
hints: There are three layers to this challenge — work through them one at a time
The == tells you where to start. The next layer only uses the digits 0-9 and letters a-f
Use 'From Base64' → 'From Hex' in CyberChef in that order
